title: Design & Provision VPC Networking
description: Create VPC, public/private subnets across 3 AZs, NAT Gateways, and Route Tables using Terraform.
acceptance_criteria: VPC created with non-overlapping CIDR; Subnets distributed across 3 AZs; Internet access verified
definition_of_done: Terraform apply successful; Network reachability tests passed

title: Provision EKS Control Plane & Node Groups
description: Deploy EKS cluster, configure OIDC provider, and set up managed node groups with autoscaling.
acceptance_criteria: Cluster status Active; Worker nodes registered in 3 AZs; Autoscaler permissions configured
definition_of_done: kubectl get nodes returns Ready for all nodes; OIDC provider validated

title: Design Audit Log Schema & OpenSearch Index
description: Define the JSON schema for audit events and provision the OpenSearch index template via Terraform.
acceptance_criteria: Schema covers Actor, Action, Entity, Changes; Index mapping defined; Immutability policy set
definition_of_done: Schema validated; Terraform plan for OpenSearch successful

title: Implement Async Audit Interceptor
description: Create a NestJS Interceptor/Decorator that captures request details and dispatches events to the logging queue.
acceptance_criteria: Interceptor captures user ID, request body; Logging is async/non-blocking
definition_of_done: Unit tests pass; Integration test verifies log appearance in mock sink
testing_requirements: Performance test to ensure no latency overhead

title: Implement SOW File Text Extraction
description: Develop service to download SOW from S3 and extract raw text from PDF/DOCX formats.
sprint_goal: Implement AI Processing Pipeline & Data Ingestion
acceptance_criteria: Supports .pdf/.docx; Handles scanned PDFs; Memory efficient
definition_of_done: Tests passed with sample SOW corpus; Memory usage within limits
testing_requirements: Corpus testing for diverse file formats
business_value: First step in SOW automation pipeline

title: Implement OpenAI PII Sanitization Logic
description: Construct prompts and logic to identify and redact PII from raw text using OpenAI.
sprint_goal: Implement AI Processing Pipeline & Data Ingestion
acceptance_criteria: Redacts Names, Emails, Phones; Replaces with [REDACTED]; Sanitized text saved to S3
definition_of_done: Passes PII detection test suite; Prompt evaluation score > 95%
deployment_notes: Sensitive prompts stored in Secrets Manager
business_value: Ensures GDPR compliance for uploaded docs

title: Implement Structured Data Extraction & Embedding
description: Extract JSON project requirements from SOW and generate vector embeddings for skills.
sprint_goal: Finalize AI Matching & Start Financial Core
acceptance_criteria: JSON matches Zod schema; Embeddings stored in pgvector; Skills indexed
definition_of_done: Extraction accuracy verified; Vector search returns relevant results
deployment_notes: Requires DB migration for vector column

title: Implement Invoice Entity & CRUD
description: Create Invoice data model, DTOs, and basic management services using NestJS and Prisma.
sprint_goal: Finalize AI Matching & Start Financial Core
acceptance_criteria: Invoice linked to Project/Client; Totals calculation correct; Status transitions valid
definition_of_done: API endpoints functional; Unit tests passing

title: Implement Stripe Payment Intent Integration
description: Service to create Stripe Customers and PaymentIntents from Invoices.
acceptance_criteria: Creates Stripe Customer; Generates PaymentIntent; Stores external IDs correctly
definition_of_done: Payment link generation functional; Integration tests with Stripe Mock pass

title: Implement Secure Webhook Handler
description: Endpoint to receive Stripe webhooks, validate signatures, and update Invoice/Project status.
acceptance_criteria: Validates Stripe-Signature; Handles payment_intent.succeeded; Idempotent processing; Updates Ledger
definition_of_done: Stripe CLI tests pass; Idempotency logic verified
